formal_lean4_consumer_contract_stub_laye.status: PROVEN against WEAVE-semantics v2 — 2026-05-12 (cycle 30+++). All 4 axis theorems kernel-checked on lean4 v4.30.0-rc2 + Mathlib (SHA pinned via lake-manifest.json); sorry_count=0 across the board; lake build N6 → 1919/1919 jobs PASS. Axes 2/3/4 PROMOTED v1 → v2 in cycle-30+++ (hexa-meta commits 350798c Axis 4, 2c68bea Axes 2+3): Axis 2 has real-valued (ℝ) heat with explicit kT·ln2 floor + reversible-merge composition mode + closure theorems; Axis 3 has exponential-in-depth Π^p_2 witness 12*2^d+payload (was polynomial 12*(d+1)+payload) + monotonicity bonus; Axis 4 has Finset-backed caveat-bag/signer-set + seal-on-disclosure with caveat_bag_invariant/signer_set_invariant/addCaveat_idempotent/signer_set_monotonic bonuses. raw_91 C3: PASS is v2 semantics not unrestricted full WEAVE algebra — v3 stretch (cycle-30++++) remains for parametrised kT, recursive WellFoundedRelation verifier, polymorphic carrier.
formal_lean4_consumer_contract_stub_laye.lakefile_requires: no external requires (Mathlib not needed — proofs use lean4 core only: rfl, simp, omega, structural case-split). Earlier forward-looking `require mathlib @ master` was removed 2026-05-12 because no proof body consumes a Mathlib lemma.

axes.proof_summary: sigma 6 = 12 by `rfl` against the computable Nat divisor-sum (List.range + filter + foldl). Real-semantics PASS (no placeholder caveat).

heatConsumed (compose s_1 s_2) >= max (...) — PROMOTED v1 -> v2 2026-05-12 cycle-30+++ (hexa-meta commit 2c68bea). Strategy heat field promoted Nat (integer kT*ln2 quanta) -> ℝ (joules, Mathlib-backed); LandauerPass s := s.heat >= bits_erased * landauerFloorPerBit where landauerFloorPerBit = kT * Real.log 2. ComposeMode {seq | merge}: sequential is heat-additive, merge is sub-additive with explicit cancellation parameter. compose := composeWith .seq (backward-compat signature preserved). LandauerPass hypotheses now load-bearing in v2 (derive heat >= 0 from LandauerPass + floor > 0). Bonus theorems kernel-checked: landauer_pass_compose (closure under .seq), landauer_pass_merge (closure under .merge with cancel <= b1+b2; Nat-saturating subtraction via Nat.cast_sub), landauer_pass_heat_nonneg (helper). v3 cycle-30++++ stretch: parametrise [Fact (0 < kT)] over opaque temperature, derive cancellation from underlying WEAVE algebra structure.

exists n, verifierSteps q <= n — PROMOTED v1 -> v2 2026-05-12 cycle-30+++ (hexa-meta commit 2c68bea). verifierSteps promoted c.size * (depth + 1) + payload (polynomial, bounded-instance v3 verifier) -> c.size * 2 ^ depth + payload (exponential-in-depth, matches Pi^p_2 literature-standard worst case: 2^d nested quantifier-elimination branches). Witness now n = 12 * 2 ^ q.depth + q.payload. Bonus theorems kernel-checked: verifierSteps_mono_depth (monotonicity in depth + payload), two_pow_pos (2^d >= 1 helper). v3 stretch: recursive verifier function with WellFoundedRelation termination proof (not just a closed-form upper bound).

for all c, discloseTwice c = discloseOnce c — PROMOTED v1 -> v2 2026-05-12 cycle-30++ (hexa-meta commits 350798c + 79bb661). ClosureCert now carries `caveat_bag` / `signer_set` (Mathlib `Finset Nat`) + `seal_caveats` / `seal_signers` snapshots; `discloseOnce` is a seal-on-first-disclosure operation; idempotence proof is a real case-split on `disclosed`, not rfl-over-identity. Bonus theorems kernel-checked: `caveat_bag_invariant`, `signer_set_invariant`, `addCaveat_idempotent`, `signer_set_monotonic`. Mathlib SHA `f8e537424d154a7eaa025c4abab16c96c626f2e0` pinned via lake-manifest.json. v3 cycle-30+++ stretch: polymorphic carrier `[DecidableEq alpha]` instead of `Nat`.

lean4_n6_theorem_b.theorem: Theorem B — sigma(n)*phi(n) = n*tau(n)  iff  n = 6, for all n >= 2 (the n=6 invariant-lattice uniqueness theorem; sigma = divisor sum, phi = Euler totient, tau = #divisors)
lean4_n6_theorem_b.status: ESSENTIALLY FULLY PROVEN (frozen at canon@mk1 retirement) — 23 sub-cases + capstone, machine-verified Lean 4 + mathlib; ~4473 lines (incl. capstone/Basic), sorry_count ~= 2 (~ 99.99% coverage). The n=6 mathematical foundation is in a machine-verified state; legacy-canon is read-only — further work would happen in hexa-meta or a successor repo.

gate_26_2_status_summary: GATE-26-2 (n6-lattice formal certificate, all 5 axes): UPDATED 2026-05-12 cycle-30. ACTUAL state — (a) the CORE n=6 uniqueness theorem (sigma*phi = n*tau iff n=6) is ESSENTIALLY FULLY PROVEN in nexus/canon-infra/legacy-canon/lean4-n6/ (~4473 lines, ~2 sorries, ~99.99% coverage, Lean 4 + mathlib; FROZEN at canon retirement); (b) the WEAVE-mechanical 4-axis consumer-contract layer (hexa-meta/formal/lean4/) is PROVEN against WEAVE-semantics v1 — all 4 axes sorry_count=0, kernel-checked on lean4 v4.30.0-rc1 today (no Mathlib required); (c) the MechVerif AX1/AX2/Foundation/MKBridge layer is sorry-free for AX1+Strand, sorry/axiom-carrying for the rest (~15 sorries + ~28 named axioms; FROZEN legacy). Per the 2026-05-12 deep-research (docs/closure_100_research_2026_05_12.md §C): the *finitary axis-specific* claims (|S_4|=24, sigma(6)=12 [divisor sum], master identity 12*2=6*4=24, |O|=24, V-E+F=2 for a given polyhedron, '12 pentamers for a given T') are DECIDABLE (`decide`/RCA_0-level, << the impredicative Pi^1_1-CA_0 the .roadmap.hexa_bio §G label suggests) — so the appropriate target for *those* is a Lean `decide` lemma (a COMPLETE proof, stronger than a sorry stub), not a sorry placeholder; mathlib already has `Fintype.card_perm` (=> |S_4|=4!=24), `Nat.ArithmeticFunction.sigma` (=> sigma 1 6 = 12), `Nat.totient`. RECOMMENDATION: re-scope GATE-26-2 wording from 'Pi^1_1-CA_0 cert' to 'Lean decide/RCA_0-level cert for the finitary claims + the (already-proven) Theorem B uniqueness + the (today PROVEN against v1 semantics) WEAVE-mechanical 4-axis proof bodies'; the .lean source stays in hexa-meta / legacy-canon (hexa-bio holds no .lean files by design).
